design_philosophy: A cutting-edge, futuristic approach combining high-contrast neon accents with deep void blacks. The design feels like a premium cyberpunk or Neo-Tokyo interface rather than a generic SaaS app. Prioritizes 'Optical Clarity' with crystal glassmorphism for floating elements and rigid, glowing borders for the admin dashboard.

typography.instruction: Avoid 'Inter' for headings. Use Unbounded for a futuristic/technical vibe. Use Outfit for readable, geometric body text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

admin_dashboard.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
rules: Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.
Use rigid 1px borders (border-white/10) to separate data.
Real-time order feed uses col-span-1 row-span-2.
Use crystal glassmorphism for floating bottom navigation and sticky headers.

surface_styles.cards: Flat background (bg-[#0A0A0A]), 1px border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: border-[#00FF66]/50 and -translate-y-1 transition.
surface_styles.glassmorphism: Crystal Glass variant for sticky headers/FABs: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10. Must have 1px inner stroke.
surface_styles.neon_borders: For active/new orders in the admin panel, use a glowing border effect or a neon left border (border-l-4 border-l-primary).

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Primary buttons use bg-primary text-black hover:brightness-110. Accent buttons use bg-accent text-black.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized to bg-[#111111] border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary.
components.dialogs: Dark glass overlays (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal body uses bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10.

animation_and_motion.hover_states: All interactives must explicitly set hover text/bg colors to maintain contrast. Buttons should have slight scale (active:scale-95).
animation_and_motion.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for subtle fade-in and slide-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on lists/menus.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='order-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over images must use bg-black/50 overlay. Ensure neon primary (#00FF66) is legible against dark backgrounds.

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing green rectangles on a dark background. Use for auth screens or global backgrounds with high opacity overlay.

restaurant_interior.description: Neon-lit interior of a futuristic ramen restaurant in Tokyo. Use for the customer landing page hero or admin dashboard banner.

food_item_1.description: Close-up of a gourmet burger on a dark slate surface. Use for menu item cards.

food_item_2.description: Alternate gourmet burger on slate. Use for menu item variations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Unbounded' (Headings) and 'Outfit' (Body) in index.html or global css.
Strictly follow the dark mode ONLY implementation. Remove any light mode toggles.
Ensure all Shadcn components are styled with the provided color variables (e.g., bg-[#0A0A0A] for cards).
Use lucide-react for icons, but set strokeWidth to 1.5 for a sleeker, modern look.
Implement the customer side as a mobile-first UI (max-w-md mx-auto if viewed on desktop, or responsive grid).
Implement the admin side utilizing the full viewport with a dense 'Control Room' bento grid.
Include data-testid on every clickable or important data element.
